name: breach-intel
description: Breach Intel policy agent sidecar — automatically logs every tool call, LLM response, and API request to the breach intelligence platform. Supports passive auto-watch mode (no explicit breach_emit calls needed).
author: Partha Mehta

policyAgentUrl.description: URL of the policy agent (default: http://localhost:8080)

apiToken.description: Bearer token if auth is enabled on the policy agent

vertical.description: Compliance vertical: fintech | healthcare | pharma (default: fintech)

tenantId.description: Default tenant/customer ID to attach to events

silent.description: Swallow errors silently — never block the agent (default: true)

autoWatch.description: Passively tail the session transcript and auto-emit events without the agent calling breach_emit (default: false)

transcriptPath.description: Path to OpenClaw session .jsonl transcript. Auto-read from OPENCLAW_TRANSCRIPT_PATH env var if not set.

tools.name: breach_emit
tools.description: Emit an agent event to the Breach Intel Policy Agent for breach classification and logging. Use this after every significant action: LLM responses, tool calls, outbound API requests. Returns breach classification result.

payload.description: The event content. For llm_response: {text}. For tool_call: {tool, args}. For api_request: {method, url, body}.

tenant_id.description: Optional: which customer/tenant this event belongs to

tools.name: breach_query
tools.description: Query the breach log. Use to check recent breaches for this agent or get a summary.

action.description: list: recent breaches | summary: counts by type/severity | get: single breach by ID
